2. Admission through TNEA Counselling & Other State Students
Chunk ID: msajce_admission_chunk_02 | ~390 tokens
TNEA counselling process for B.E/B.Tech and Q-score formula for other state candidates.
ADMISSION THROUGH TNEA COUNSELLING
Students who completed Plus 2 / Diploma may apply for Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA Counselling) for B.E /
B.Tech programmes, conducted by Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai.
Portal URL
TNEA Counselling https://tneaonline.org/
Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) http://www.tndte.gov.in/site/
Anna University https://www.annauniv.edu/
ELIGIBILITY FOR STUDENTS FROM OTHER STATES (Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala & all Northern
States)
Selection is based on qualifying marks (Q) in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry at Plus Two / Intermediate level:
Formula: Q = (Mathematics  2) + ((Physics + Chemistry)  4)
Contact  Admission Coordinator for Other State Students
Dr. Vamsi Naga Mohan A. (Languages: Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam, Hindi) Phone: 9043358674 / 9502687344 Email:
cse.vamsi@msajce-edu.in

3. B.E / B.Tech Eligibility  HSC Academic, Vocational & Lateral Entry
Chunk ID: msajce_admission_chunk_03 | ~540 tokens
Community-wise minimum eligibility marks for B.E/B.Tech via HSC Academic, HSC Vocational, and Lateral Entry routes.
HSC (ACADEMIC)  Minimum Eligibility Marks
A pass in HSC (Academic) or equivalent with minimum average percentage in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry combined:

S.No Community Min. Average Marks (Maths + Physics +
. Chemistry)
1 General Category 45.00%
2 Backward Class (incl. Backward Class Muslim) 40.00%
3 MBC & DNC 40.00%
4 SC / SCA / ST 40.00%
HSC (VOCATIONAL)  Minimum Eligibility Marks
A pass in HSC (Vocational) with any one Engineering-related subject (Maths, Physics or Chemistry), minimum average
percentage:
S.No Community Min. Average Marks (Vocational Theory &
. Practicals)
1 General Category 45.00%
2 Backward Class (incl. Backward Class Muslim) 40.00%
3 MBC & DNC 40.00%
4 SC / SCA / ST 40.00%
DIRECT SECOND YEAR B.E./B.TECH.  LATERAL ENTRY
Diploma Candidates: Pass in appropriate Diploma branch from TNSBTET or equivalent.
B.Sc. Candidates: Recognized B.Sc. degree (min. 3 years, 10+2+3 pattern) with core Mathematics at degree level. Note:
Degrees other than B.Sc. are not eligible.
S.No Community Min. Eligibility Marks (Lateral Entry)
.
1 General Category 55.00%
2 Backward Class (incl. Backward Class Muslim) 50.00%
3 MBC & DNC 45.00%
4 SC / SCA / ST Mere pass in qualifying exam (Diploma / B.Sc.)
H When a grade certificate is produced, actual marks must also be submitted. Otherwise only minimum marks for the grade will be
considered.

4. M.E / M.Tech & Ph.D Admission Eligibility
Chunk ID: msajce_admission_chunk_04 | ~490 tokens

Eligibility for M.E./M.Tech. in CSE and Structural Engineering, and Ph.D in Mechanical Engineering including CGPA requirements.
M.E. / M.TECH. PROGRAMMES (2 Years)
S.N PG Programme Qualification for Admission
o.
1 M.E. Computer Science & B.E./B.Tech. (EEE / ECE / CSE / IT / I&C; / E&I; / Electronics / Instrumentation) OR
Engineering M.C.A.* or M.Sc. 5-yr integrated (IT / CSE / Software Engg.)*  10+2+3+3 pattern
2 M.E. Structural Engineering B.E. Degree in Civil Engineering
Admission to M.E. courses is based on qualifying examination marks and/or TANCET (Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test)
conducted by Anna University.
Ph.D  MECHANICAL ENGINEERING
Requirement Details
Standard Route M.E. / M.Tech. / M.S. (By Research) in relevant Engineering or Technology branch
Industry Route B.E./B.Tech. + min. 15 years R&D; in National Research Labs / PSUs + 3 publications in
impact-factor journals OR 2 approved international patents (last 5 years)
Min. Marks  General 55% marks OR CGPA  5.5 on 10-point scale
Min. Marks  SC/ST / 50% marks OR CGPA  5.0 on 10-point scale
Differently-Abled
Study Order Required 10th fi HSC fi UG/PG Degree or equivalent
